◎简　　介  

　　This documentary film follows the first manned expedition to RMS Titanic in nearly 15 years and captures the wreck for the first time in stunning native 4K. The program follows Caladan Oceanic’s deep-ocean exploration team, led by explorer Victor Vescovo, as they set out to solve some of the wreck’s greatest mysteries.
